meta-description: Learn about public health by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Public health
excerpt: A field that seeks to improve lives and the health of communities through the prevention and treatment of disease and the promotion of healthy behaviors such as healthy eating and exercise.
content: A field that seeks to improve lives and the health of communities through the prevention and treatment of disease and the promotion of healthy behaviors such as healthy eating and exercise.
